BAG_OF_PREPARATION.description:
At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
At the start of your second turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card
BAG_OF_PREPARATION.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
BAG_OF_PREPARATION.title: Bag of Preparation
AMETHYST_AUBERGINE.description:
Upon pickup, gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
Enemies drop [blue]{Gold}[/blue] additional [gold]Gold[/gold].
AMETHYST_AUBERGINE.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
AMETHYST_AUBERGINE.title: Amethyst Aubergine
BOOK_OF_FIVE_RINGS.description: Every [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], and heal [green]{Heal}[/green]，gain [blue]{Heal}[/blue] Max HP.
BOOK_OF_FIVE_RINGS.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
BOOK_OF_FIVE_RINGS.title: Book of Five Rings
CENTENNIAL_PUZZLE.description: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}, and gain [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.
CENTENNIAL_PUZZLE.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
CENTENNIAL_PUZZLE.title: Centennial Puzzle
BOWLER_HAT.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
BOWLER_HAT.title: Bowler Hat
INTIMIDATING_HELMET.description: Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] for each {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTIMIDATING_HELMET.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
INTIMIDATING_HELMET.title: Intimidating Helmet
MEAT_ON_THE_BONE.description: If your HP is at or below [blue]{HpThreshold}%/70%[/blue] at the end of combat, heal [green]{Heal}/3[/green] HP.
MEAT_ON_THE_BONE.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
MEAT_ON_THE_BONE.title: Meat on the Bone
SWORD_OF_JADE.description:
Start each combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. 
 Your [gold]Dexterity[/gold] also increase attack damage
SWORD_OF_JADE.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
SWORD_OF_JADE.title: Sword of Jade
